title: What I do
summary: description: Generate a structured weekly training scorecard. Load when the athlete asks for a weekly review, weekly summary, training check-in, or "how's my training going". Pulls weekly TSS, zone distribution, CTL/ATL/TSB trend, untracked activities, and RPE feedback, then produces a compact scorecard with flag analysis and next-week adjustments.
